title: ORDER BY clause does not produce proper results on 'inet' datatype
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE network_data ( ip_address TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT DEFAULT 'No description' );
INSERT INTO network_data (ip_address, description) VALUES('192.168.1.1', 'Home router');
INSERT INTO network_data (ip_address, description) VALUES('10.0.0.1', 'Office router');
INSERT INTO network_data (ip_address, description) VALUES(NULL, 'Unknown device');
SELECT * FROM network_data ORDER BY ip_address;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY clause on inet datatype
